main.summary: Provides a public runtime resolution API using exact requested identity matching.
main.remarks: This provider is intended for late-bound reflection workflows. It honors the configured type name exactly and, when outer assembly identity components are supplied directly or through configured assembly names, it honors the supplied assembly name, version, culture, and public key token strictly and case-sensitively during default-context resolution and active-context probing. When configured for , candidate source precedence is default-context resolution, then the active context's already loaded assemblies, then configured in-memory assembly images, configured assembly file paths, and configured directories. When configured for , default-context resolution is skipped entirely and resolution is restricted to the active context plus configured probe sources. When a caller supplies an , that context is used as-is and is never owned or unloaded by this provider. Otherwise the provider creates and owns a collectible probing context on demand.

field.name: AssemblyPaths
field.summary: Optional candidate assembly file paths for active-context probing.
field.remarks: Paths are normalized to full paths, filtered to existing files, and de-duplicated case-insensitively.

field.name: AssemblyDirectories
field.summary: Optional candidate directories for active-context probing.
field.remarks: Directories are normalized to full paths, filtered to existing directories, de-duplicated case-insensitively, and scanned non-recursively for *.dll candidates.

field.name: AssemblyImages
field.summary: Optional in-memory assembly images for active-context probing.
field.remarks: Assembly images are owned snapshots of caller-provided instances. Unreadable or non-assembly streams are silently ignored.

field.name: AssemblyNames
field.summary: Optional configured assembly identities used to refine type-only requests.
field.remarks: Used only when does not already supply outer assembly identity. Configured identities are treated as candidate strict filters and resolution succeeds when any configured identity yields a match.

field.name: Context
field.summary: Active load context used for private probing.
field.remarks: May be a caller-supplied context or a collectible context created and owned by this provider.

field.name: ContextResolver
field.summary: Dependency resolver delegate attached to the owned load context.
field.remarks: Only populated when this provider creates and owns the active context.

field.name: OwnsContext
field.summary: Tracks whether the active load context is provider-owned.

field.name: Mode
field.summary: Selected type resolution behavior for this provider instance.

property.name: Name
property.remarks: Accepts either an exact type name or a partially or fully assembly-qualified type name. Whatever assembly name, version, culture, and public key token components are supplied directly are honored strictly and override configured assembly names.

property.name: Value
property.remarks: Once set, fails fast and returns the cached value until clears it or clears it for provider-owned contexts.

constructor.name: Constructor
constructor.summary: Create a provider with the requested resolution mode.
constructor.param: Resolution mode for this provider instance.
constructor.remarks: Defaults to . Invalid enum values fall back to .

method.name: Create
method.summary: Create a provider preconfigured with type name.
method.param: Resolution mode for the created provider.
method.returns: Provider instance.

method.name: WithType
method.summary: Fluent method to configure type name.
method.returns: Current provider instance.

method.name: SetType
method.summary: Configure the target type name.
method.returns: True when the name was accepted; otherwise false.

method.name: WithAssemblyPaths
method.summary: Fluent method to configure probe assembly file paths.
method.returns: Current provider instance.

method.name: SetAssemblyPaths
method.summary: Configure probe assembly file paths.
method.returns: True when at least one valid path was accepted; otherwise false.

method.name: WithAssemblyImages
method.summary: Fluent method to configure probe assembly images.
method.returns: Current provider instance.
method.remarks: Provided instances are treated as owned inputs and may be disposed after snapshotting.

method.name: SetAssemblyImages
method.summary: Configure probe assembly images.
method.returns: True when at least one valid assembly image was accepted; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Fails when is already set. Invalid, unreadable, or non-assembly streams are silently ignored and accepted streams are snapshotted to owned memory before the input streams are disposed.

method.name: WithDirectories
method.summary: Fluent method to configure probe directories.
method.returns: Current provider instance.

method.name: SetDirectories
method.summary: Configure probe directories.
method.returns: True when at least one valid directory was accepted; otherwise false.

method.name: WithAssemblyNames
method.summary: Fluent method to configure candidate assembly identities.
method.returns: Current provider instance.

method.name: SetAssemblyNames
method.summary: Configure candidate assembly identities.
method.returns: True when at least one valid identity was accepted; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Fails when is already set. Identities are normalized to the strict fields used by this provider and de-duplicated.

method.name: WithContext
method.summary: Fluent method to configure the active load context.
method.returns: Current provider instance.

method.name: SetContext
method.summary: Configure the active load context.
method.returns: True when the context was accepted; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Fails when is already set or when the supplied context is null. If this provider currently owns a different active context, that owned context is unloaded before the supplied context is accepted. Caller-supplied contexts are used as-is and are never owned, decorated, or unloaded by this provider.

method.name: Clear
method.summary: Clear the configured type name and cached resolved type.
method.returns: True when clear succeeds; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Preserves configured assembly paths, configured directories, configured assembly images, configured assembly names, and the active context.

method.name: Unload
method.summary: Unload the owned context and clear the cached resolved type.
method.returns: True when unload bookkeeping succeeds; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Preserves configured type name, assembly paths, configured directories, configured assembly images, and configured assembly names. Fails fast when the active context was supplied by the caller instead of created and owned by this provider.

method.name: TryResolve
method.summary: Resolve the configured type.
method.returns: True when resolution succeeds; otherwise false.

method.name: Resolve
method.summary: Resolve and return the target type.
method.returns: Resolved type or null.
method.remarks: Returns the cached value when already resolved; otherwise follows the current provider mode.

method.name: TryResolveNoSync
method.summary: Core resolver logic that assumes synchronization has already been acquired.
method.returns: True when resolution succeeds; otherwise false.

method.name: TryGetEffectiveRequestsNoSync
method.summary: Derive the effective requested identities for resolution.
method.returns: True when at least one effective request is available; otherwise false.
method.remarks: If already supplies outer assembly identity it remains authoritative and yields a single request. Otherwise each configured assembly identity contributes a candidate strict request; without configured identities the original type-only request is used.

method.name: TryResolveInDefaultContextNoSync
method.summary: Attempt strict normal resolution against the default load context.
method.returns: True when the type is already available in the default load context and matches the requested identity; otherwise false.

method.name: EnsureActiveContextNoSync
method.summary: Ensure that the active load context exists.
method.returns: Active context or null.

method.name: UnloadOwnedContextNoSync
method.summary: Detach resolver state and unload the owned context.
method.returns: True when context bookkeeping succeeds; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Fails fast when the active context is caller-supplied.

method.name: EnumerateCandidateAssemblyPathsNoSync
method.summary: Enumerate candidate assembly files that satisfy the requested outer assembly identity.
method.returns: Candidate assembly file paths.
method.remarks: Explicit configured assembly file paths are yielded before non-recursive *.dll candidates discovered from configured directories.

method.name: GetAssemblyDirectoriesNoSync
method.summary: Extract unique candidate directories from configured assembly paths and configured directories.
method.returns: Unique candidate directories.

method.name: TryResolveFromPathsInActiveContextNoSync
method.summary: Probe the active load context plus configured assembly paths and directories using strict requested identity matching.
method.returns: True when the type is resolved; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Runs after active-context probing against in-memory assembly images.

method.name: TryResolveFromImagesInActiveContextNoSync
method.summary: Probe the active load context and configured in-memory assembly images using strict requested identity matching.
method.returns: True when the type is resolved; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Checks already loaded assemblies in the active context before loading configured images and runs before file-path and directory probing.

method.name: ResolveContextDependency
method.summary: Resolve active-context dependencies from configured assembly images, assembly paths, and configured directories.
method.returns: Loaded dependency assembly or null.

method.name: TryLoadImageByRequestedAssemblyInContext
method.summary: Load a matching dependency from configured in-memory assembly images.
method.returns: Loaded dependency assembly or null.

method.name: MatchesRequestAssembly
method.summary: Validate that a candidate assembly satisfies the requested outer assembly identity.
method.returns: True when the candidate assembly matches the supplied request components; otherwise false.

method.name: MatchesRequestedAssembly
method.summary: Validate that a candidate assembly satisfies a dependency assembly request.
method.returns: True when the candidate satisfies the requested dependency identity; otherwise false.

method.name: TryGetAssemblyName
method.summary: Read assembly identity metadata from an assembly file path.
method.returns: True when assembly identity metadata is available; otherwise false.

method.name: TrySnapshotAssemblyImage
method.summary: Snapshot a caller-provided in-memory assembly stream.
method.returns: True when snapshotting succeeds and the image looks like an assembly; otherwise false.

method.name: TryReadAssemblyName
method.summary: Read assembly identity metadata from an in-memory assembly image.
method.returns: True when assembly identity metadata is available; otherwise false.

method.name: AssemblyNamesEqual
method.summary: Compare two normalized configured assembly identities.
method.returns: True when the normalized identities are equal; otherwise false.

method.name: GetCultureText
method.summary: Normalize assembly culture text for strict comparison.
method.returns: Normalized culture text.

method.name: GetPublicKeyTokenText
method.summary: Normalize assembly public key token text for strict comparison.
method.returns: Normalized public key token text.

method.name: TryFindLoadedByPathInContext
method.summary: Find a loaded assembly in the active context by physical path.
method.returns: Loaded assembly or null.

method.name: TryFindLoadedByRequestInContext
method.summary: Find a loaded assembly in the active context that satisfies the requested outer assembly identity.
method.returns: Loaded assembly or null.

method.name: TryFindLoadedByRequestedAssemblyInContext
method.summary: Find a loaded assembly in the active context that satisfies a dependency assembly request.
method.returns: Loaded assembly or null.

method.name: TryParseRequestNoSync
method.summary: Parse the configured name into a progressively strict requested identity.
method.returns: True when parsing succeeds; otherwise false.

method.name: FindAssemblySeparator
method.summary: Find the outer assembly separator in a type name.
method.returns: Separator index or -1.
method.remarks: Ignores commas inside bracketed generic type argument lists.

method.name: TryParseAssemblyIdentity
method.summary: Parse the supplied outer assembly identity components.
method.param: Assembly identity text following the outer type token.
True when version was explicitly supplied.
True when culture was explicitly supplied.
True when public key token was explicitly supplied.
method.returns: True when parsing succeeds; otherwise false.

method.name: TypeRequestsEqual
method.summary: Compare two effective requests for deduplication.
method.returns: True when the effective requests are equal; otherwise false.

method.name: TryResolveInAssembly
method.summary: Resolve the exact requested type name from a specific assembly.
method.returns: True when the exact requested type is resolved; otherwise false.

method.name: MatchesResolvedType
method.summary: Validate that a resolved runtime type satisfies the requested identity.
method.returns: True when the resolved type matches the request; otherwise false.

method.name: TryNormalizeAssemblyName
method.summary: Normalize a configured assembly identity to the strict fields used by this provider.
method.returns: True when normalization succeeds; otherwise false.
